teddi.notes: Example: python scripts/3gpp_research.py run-tool teddi search-term QoS --pattern exactmatch

telco-rag.notes: Replace with the local Telco-RAG CLI or wrapper command if installed.

chat3gpp.notes: Replace with the local Chat3GPP CLI or wrapper command if installed.

3gpp-mcp.notes: Replace with your local MCP client wrapper. MCP hosts often need an Agent-side integration rather than a plain CLI.

patent-mcp.notes: Local JSON-lines patent background tool. Use for auxiliary pain-point analysis only; do not treat patent background as 3GPP standard evidence.
